final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing interior design illustration of an industrial-style cafe.

Style/medium: needs an "industrial" aesthetic with rugged sophistication — references in the spirit of 1990s New York loft conversion photography, Kinfolk magazine raw-material editorial style, Tokyo 倉庫系 cafe interior design movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include exposed concrete walls, metal pipes, vintage leather sofa, large windows with natural light, black-and-white photography on walls
Scene/backdrop: must include a cafe interior with industrial architectural elements
Lighting/mood: needs a natural light atmosphere with rugged sophistication — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a raw, tactile surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
